flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Flint Hills Technical College fell 16% between 2006 and 2009 (80.0% → 67.6%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Flint Hills Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Flint Hills Technical College fell 30% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.5k → $6.6k).
